name: Warden of Chains
lore_text:
Warden of Chains — Mini-Bosses of Stone/Oath Duality.
A rare presence whose choices bend the battlefield toward fate.
Iconography: Stone/Oath sigils, attire marked by duty.
mechanics_text:
Basic Initiative (3)
🛡️ Guard 5 • ⚔️ First Strike 2
Reduces first incoming hit by 40%; Allies within 1 tile gain +1 Guard this round; End step: pay 1 supply or take 2 recoil.
• Count resources; burst then rotate.
• Pair with allies that cover your weakest stat.
• Trade only when your initiative window is open.
